name: The Invincible War
description:
Earth has been invaded by evil Invincibles causing chaos all around the globe, with every hero on earth putting effort into stopping them. But who planned all of this? Well, it's of course the most pettiest villain in the universe, Angstrom Levy!

Since the hype of Invincible is still going, I've decided to make the last Invincible bot as of now, with The Invincible War, but this time with women. I've also only added the 10 most memorable variants as to not make this bot have a lot of tokens, so sorry... uh, Capvincible fans.

I'm sorry if the AI has a tiny chance to talk for your character, or just have a stroke. That's just JanitorAi being JanitorAi. Anyway, have fun with the bot!

(All of the Femvincibles are made by @Blannis_Art)
creator: Gaawd
